title: A. O. Smith (AOS) Beats on Q2 Earnings, Revises 2023 View
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q2 results benefit from the continued demand for North America commercial and residential water heater products. The company hikes its earnings guidance for 2023.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Tops Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.01 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.91 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.82 per share a year ago.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold Second Quarter Conference Call on July 27, 2023

title: A. O. Smith Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: MILWAUKEE, July 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Directors of A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $.30 per share on the company's Common Stock and Class A Common Stock.
